parts.text: Is our team's shared memory up to date? Check all Fivetran data source connections and report which ones are synced, which are stale, and when data was last pulled.
What does our shared memory contain? Query BigQuery for the team's data and summarize what's available. How many records do we have and when was it last synced?
Trace the provenance of our team data — show the latest sync events and lineage from source to BigQuery using Platform Connector metadata. I want to know the full data journey.
What dbt transformations exist to structure our raw data into analytics-ready tables? What output tables do they produce? Do not run anything — just report status.
Show the codebase log timeline for github.com/demo/api-service. What file edits, decisions, and errors happened in the last Cursor session? What should a new Antigravity agent know?

Give me a complete team status: are our data source pipelines healthy, what data do we have in shared memory, how fresh is it, and what structured analytics tables are available? Summarize everything.
